login.title: Log in
login.description: Continue by logging into your account.
login.errorDefault: Login failed. Please check your information.

register.title: Register
register.description: Start by creating a new account.
register.hasAccount: Do you already have an account?
register.passwordTooShort: The password must be at least 6 characters long.

forgotPassword.title: I forgot my password.
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we will send you a password reset link.
forgotPassword.successDescription: The password reset link has been sent to your email address. Please check your inbox.
forgotPassword.errorDefault: An error occurred. Please check your email address.

resetPassword.title: Set a New Password
resetPassword.description: Set a new password for your account.
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been successfully updated. You can log in with your new password.
resetPassword.invalidLinkDescription: The password reset link is invalid or incomplete. Please double-check the link in your email.
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: The password must be at least 6 characters long.
resetPassword.errorDefault: Password reset failed. The connection may be invalid or expired.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noListings: You haven't added any ads yet.
dashboard.noMessages: You haven't received a message yet.
dashboard.noNotifications: You haven't received any notifications yet.

myListings.title: My ads
myListings.description: Manage all your listings from here.
myListings.noListings: You haven't added any ads yet.

favorites.title: My favorites
favorites.description: Follow the products you like here.
favorites.noFavorites: You haven't added any favorite products yet.
favorites.fetchError: An error occurred while loading favorites.

updatePassword.title: Update Password
updatePassword.description: Update your password regularly for the security of your account.
updatePassword.success: Your password has been successfully updated.
updatePassword.passwordTooShort: The new password must be at least 6 characters long.
updatePassword.sessionError: Session information could not be found.
updatePassword.errorDefault: The password could not be updated. Please check your current password.

hero.title: Live Animal Trading Platform
hero.subtitle: The most reliable live animal trading platform. Buy and sell your cattle and sheep safely.

secure.title: Secure Shopping
secure.description: All transactions are secure. Seller and buyer information has been verified.

variety.title: Wide Product Range
variety.description: Cattle, sheep, and more. Easily find the animal you're looking for.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.description: We are always here for your questions. Our live support line is active.

products.title: Products
products.showing: The total of {total} products between {from} and {to}.
products.loginToFavorite: Log in to add to favorites.

productDetail.loginRequired: Log in to add to favorites.

newListing.title: Create New Listing
newListing.maxImages: You can upload a maximum of 10 images.
newListing.imageHint: Minimum 1, maximum 10 images. In PNG, JPG, or WEBP format.

placeholders.title: Example: 2-Year-Old Holstein Cow
placeholders.description: Provide detailed information about the product...

newListing.error: An error occurred while creating the advertisement.
newListing.creationFailed: The product could not be created. Please try again.
